landing.hero.sub: narve.ai turns raw Polymarket, crypto, stock, weather and geopolitical data into focused dashboards you actually want to look at. Subscribe to the ones that sharpen your edge. Ignore the rest.
landing.hero.trust: No free tier gimmicks. No ads. No data reselling.
landing.features.title: Pick and mix dashboards
landing.features.sub: Every card is a separate subscription. Start with one, add more when you want them, cancel individually.
landing.pricing.title: Level up your Polymarket trading today
landing.pricing.trader.name: Trader
landing.pricing.trader.desc: For active traders getting started with signal intelligence
landing.pricing.trader.features: 30-day data window · 10 markets · Global credibility scores · Best bets (top 5) · Probability % on all bets
landing.pricing.pro.name: Pro
landing.pricing.pro.desc: For serious traders who want the full edge
landing.pricing.pro.features: Everything in Trader · 6-month data · Unlimited markets · Full credibility · Signal Search (AI) · Push notifications
landing.pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
landing.pricing.enterprise.desc: For funds, institutions, and custom use cases
landing.pricing.enterprise.features: Everything in Pro · Full history · API access · Custom integrations · Unlimited topics · Trading included
landing.pricing.currency_note: Prices shown in GBP and USD. Charged in GBP. USD shown for reference.
status.uptime_window: Uptime history for the last 90 days
auth.msg.invite_prompt: Have an invite token? Use it here.
auth.msg.password_reset_success: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.msg.password_reset_all_logged_out: Password reset successfully. All sessions have been logged out. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.msg.reset_check_your_email: If that account exists, a password-reset link has been sent.
auth.msg.email_mismatch: Email does not match the account linked to this token.
auth.err.password_min_length: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.err.password_complexity: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
auth.err.reset_link_used: This reset link has already been used.
auth.err.reset_link_expired: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.err.reset_rate_limited: Too many password reset attempts. Please wait and try again later.
